video_title: Formula 1: Drive to Survive - Season 7 | Official Trailer | Netflix
comment_text: It feels like Netflix keeps catering to the people who know nothing about F1. It’s like every season and every episode is tailored to someone who knows nothing about it. Which is sort of why they got so big at first, but I feel like they need to switch the narrative up a little bit. I’ve watched every season so far and I’m getting kind of sick of the whole “this is the pinnacle of Motorsport” thing, and “we need to be faster this year”. Yeah, no shit. Show us something other than them saying they need to be faster, show us the details, show us some engineering stuff, show us some development or behind the scenes strategy. You probably wouldn’t be able to show any top secret stuff obviously, but show the sport more in depth than just the drama. I’ve really enjoyed @Driver61 videos talking about race-craft and engineering stuff. Idk, I just feel like DTS is getting monotonous.
